Off Calendar Jun-06-2017 Continued To Aug-08-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For 1)Financial Abuse Of An Elder Under W&I 15610.070;2)Removal Of Trustee And Confirmation Of Callie Williams As Sole Trustee; 3)Actual Frau
Off Calendar Apr-11-2017 Continued To Jun-06-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Amanda Ebey for Callie Williams.
Bryan Miles appeared by telephone for Ira Rogers.

Ms. Ebey stated that they conducted most of the discovery, that they tried twice to schedule mediation with Stella Pantazis and were unable to, and that they would like a return date for status of mediation two months out. The Petition for Financial Abuse of An Elder Under W&I 15610.070 etc. is continued to June 6, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. In the absence of settlement, the parties are to submit a joint status statement by June 30, 2017 as to how the matter will get resolved and trial setting/length of trial.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.

Petition For 1)Financial Abuse Of An Elder Under W&I 15610.070;2)Removal Of Trustee And Confirmation Of Callie Williams As Sole Trustee; 3)Actual Frau
Off Calendar Mar-07-2017 Continued To Apr-11-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For 1)Financial Abuse Of An Elder Under W&I 15610.070;2)Removal Of Trustee And Confirmation Of Callie Williams As Sole Trustee; 3)Actual Frau
Off Calendar Dec-13-2016 Continued To Mar-07-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Amanda Ebey for and with Callie Williams. Brian Miles (via Court Call) for (respondent) Ira Rogers.

The Court asked if discovery is complete. Ms. Ebey reported that it is not, that they have taken depositions and that they are amenable to and qualify for pro bono mediation. Mr. Miles stated that they had deferred the issue of venue, that they believe the case should be heard in Los Angeles and that they may need to deal with that first. The Court stated that they may have passed that threshold and that there is no motion to transfer before the Court. The Parties agreed to participate in mediation. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than February 28, 2017. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by March 2, 2017. The Petition for financial abuse of an elder, etc., was continued to and the Parties are to return on March 7, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation. The Court expects discovery to be complete and that it the issues are not resolved counsel are to file a joint status statement regarding the length of trial, number of witnesses and remaining issues no later than March 2, 2017.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Ideta. (Not Reported)

Petition For 1)Financial Abuse Of An Elder Under W&I 15610.070;2)Removal Of Trustee And Confirmation Of Callie Williams As Sole Trustee; 3)Actual Frau
Off Calendar Sep-13-2016 Continued To Dec-13-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Amanda Ebey for and with co-trustee Callie Williams; Brian Miles (by CourtCall) for co-trustee Ira Rogers.

Ms. Ebey informed the Court that she and Mr. Miles had agreed upon a date for the taking of a deposition of Mr. Rogers. She said that the parties had discussed mediation, but she wants to conduct some initial discovery prior to a return date. Mr. Miles confirmed that he also wants to conduct initial discovery before mediation. The Court noted thatthe longer the matter remained in this court, the more difficult it would be to obtain a change of venue. Mr. Miles stated he was aware of that, but was willing for the matters to be continued. The matter was continued to December 13, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for a report on the status of the case and mediation.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Chan. (Not reported)
